description: Test GIS package for Europol using publicly documented headquarters and organisational functions. Physical data-centre locations are not asserted because they are not publicly documented in reliable sources.

layers.meaning: physical HQ plus public functional units represented near HQ
logical services/placeholders, not claimed physical data-centre coordinates
selected EU security/information ecosystem nodes for relations

recommended_qgis_use: Load all GeoJSONs, group them under EUROPOL, style points by kind/status and relations by relation_type.
data_quality_note: Coordinates for HQ are from public geolocation; functional nodes are intentionally offset from HQ for readability. Do not interpret offsets as exact offices or server rooms.
sources: Europol contact page: Eisenhowerlaan 73, The Hague
Europol Operational and Analysis Centre page
Europol operational information services / EIS page
